settings.heading: How to Order Trophies Online in India
settings.subheading: A simple step-by-step guide to ordering custom trophies, medals and mementos online in India — from sharing your brief to delivery, with proofs and GST invoicing along the way.

settings.label: Quick answer
settings.text: To order trophies online in India with Meru Trophy: share your requirement on WhatsApp (+91 78922 07252) or our contact form, approve a design proof and quote, pay a 50% advance with GST invoice, and we craft and deliver pan-India. Simple and fully documented.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.text: Ordering custom awards online is straightforward with us. You don't navigate a complicated configurator — you tell us what you need, we design and quote, you approve a proof, and we make and deliver. Everything is documented: spec, mockup, GST invoice and tracking. Here's the full process.

settings.title: Simple brief
settings.text: No complex configurator — just tell us what you need.

settings.title: Tell us what you need
settings.text: WhatsApp, call or fill the form with occasion, quantity, material and date.

settings.title: Get options & a quote
settings.text: We share designs, matching past work and a clear quote — usually same day.

settings.title: Approve proof & advance
settings.text: Sign off a digital mockup; 50% advance via UPI/transfer/card with GST invoice.

settings.title: Made & dispatched
settings.text: Crafted in our Bangalore workshop, QC'd and tracked to your venue.

settings.question: How do I place an order online?
settings.answer: WhatsApp +91 78922 07252 or use our contact form with your requirement; we handle design, quote, proof and delivery.

settings.question: Do I pay fully upfront?
settings.answer: Typically a 50% advance to start production, balance before dispatch, with a GST invoice.

settings.question: Will I see the design before it's made?
settings.answer: Yes — a digital proof for approval before production.

settings.question: Can I order from outside Bangalore?
settings.answer: Yes — we deliver pan-India and ship internationally.

settings.heading: Ready to start?
settings.text: Message us your requirement and event date — we'll guide you through and quote, usually within the hour.
